zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne於1564年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾斯托克時，她的父親William Dennis24歲，母親Mary21歲。她於大約1584年與Dennis Pratt在津巴布韋米德藍茲維盧瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1614年7月21日在英國英格蘭韋斯特 米德藍茲考文垂享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne于1564年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾斯托克时，她的父亲William Dennis24岁，母亲Mary21岁。她于大约1584年与Dennis Pratt在辛巴威米德藍茲維盧瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1614年7月21日在英国英格兰韋斯特 米德藍茲考文垂享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

variants.name: Nancy
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nan
meanings: Originally a pet form of Ann (for the initial N-, compare Ned ). It is now also widely used as a short form of Nancy .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne was born in 1564, in Stoke, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Dennis, was 24 and her mother, Mary, was 21. She married Dennis Pratt about 1584, in Warwickshire, Gweru, Midlands, Zimbabwe. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 21 July 1614, in Coventry, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne est née en 1564, à Stoke, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Dennis, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mary, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Dennis Pratt environ 1584, à Warwickshire, Gweru, Midlands, Zimbabwe. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 juillet 1614, à Coventry, West Midlands, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.Coventry, West Midlands, England: Coventry, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Anne 1564 in Stoke, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Dennis 24 und ihre Mutter Mary 21. Sie hat um 1584 in Warwickshire, Gweru, Midlands, Simbabwe Dennis Pratt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Juli 1614 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Coventry, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne è nata il nel 1564 nel Stoke, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Dennis, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Mary, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Dennis Pratt circa 1584, nel Warwickshire, Gweru, Midlands, Zimbabwe. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 21 luglio 1614, nel Coventry, West Midlands, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anneが1564年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストクで生まれた時，父William Dennisは24歳，母Maryは21歳であった。約1584年にジンバブエミドランズグウエルワーウィクシュアイアでDennis Prattと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1614年7月21日にイギリスイギリスウエスト ミドランズコベントリーで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne(이)가 1564년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스토크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Dennis(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1584년 짐바브웨 미들랜드즈 그워 워윅실르에서 Dennis Pratt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1614년 7월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 미들랜드즈 커븐트리에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne nasceu em 1564, em Stoke, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Dennis, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mary, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Dennis Pratt aproximadamente 1584, em Warwickshire, Gweru, Midlands, Zimbábue. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de julho de 1614, em Coventry, West Midlands, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos.

ro.Coventry, West Midlands, England: Coventry, West Midlands, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne родилась в 1564 г. в местности сток, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Dennis было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mary, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Dennis Pratt около 1584 г. в местности варвиккшир, гвиру, мидландс, Зимбабве. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 21 июля 1614 г. в местности ковентри, вест мидландс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

Se casó con Dennis Pratt aproximadamente 1584, en Warwickshire, Gweru, Midlands, Zimbabue. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de julio de 1614, en Coventry, West Midlands, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
